creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Created attachment 190415
patch against head

Hi,

Patch adapted from: http://git.haproxy.org/?p=haproxy.git;a=commitdiff;h=1a69af6d3892fe1946bb8babb3044d2d26afd46e

Adapted to use sync built-ins on Clang by default.  Feel free to change that approach.

I hope this also unblocks the move of haproxy 1.8.3 landing as "haproxy", not "haproxy-devel" ?


Cheers,
Franco
